description: CompositionBlack henley neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and in-seam, chest buttoned placket, half sleeves and applique work on left chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Stylish with a chest buttoned placket, this cotton t-shirt from lee speaks volumes of your sense of style. The pride of wearing a lee is something that you feel only when you wear one. So don this tee in style with jeans and casual footwear for that cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
